headline: Abbott acquisition of Exact Sciences set to close on March 23, 2026
summary: Abbott (NYSE: ABT) today announced that it expects to close the acquisition of Exact Sciences on Monday, March 23, 2026. The announcement follows receipt of all regulatory clearances necessary for closing.

raw.headline: Abbott acquisition of Exact Sciences set to close on March 23, 2026
raw.summary: Abbott (NYSE: ABT) today announced that it expects to close the acquisition of Exact Sciences on Monday, March 23, 2026. The announcement follows receipt of all regulatory clearances necessary for closing.

headline: Abbott to close $21B Exact Sciences acquisition Monday
summary: Abbott said it has received all regulatory clearances necessary to buy the cancer screening firm.

raw.headline: Abbott to close $21B Exact Sciences acquisition Monday
raw.summary: Abbott said it has received all regulatory clearances necessary to buy the cancer screening firm.

headline: Abbott Announces Acquisition Of Exact Sciences To Close March 23rd; Exact Sciences Stockholders To Receive $105/Share
summary: As previously communicated, this transaction is expected to add approximately $3 billion of incremental sales in 2026, accelerate Abbott's 2026 sales growth by approximately 0.5% and dilute 2026 adjusted earnings per
